title: Jedi Killer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jedi Killer''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Ben Solo|Kylo Ren]]''', known amongst the [[First Order]] ranks as the "Jedi Killer" for [[Destruction of the Jedi Temple|preventing]] the restoration of the [[Jedi Order]]. Prior to being officially named, Ren was also known as "Jedi Killer" during pre-production on [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].
*'''[[Jedi hunter]]''', a term for an individual who hunted [[Jedi]].
*'''[[Inquisitorius]]''', Jedi killers who served the [[Galactic Empire]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Jedi killer]]''', a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that attacked and killed many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].
*'''[[JK-13 security droid]]s''', unofficially known as Jedi Killer droids.
*'''[[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]]''', the Legends version of the term for an individual who hunted Jedi.
*'''[[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]]''', the Legends version of the Jedi killers who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Disambig}}
